title: Server API Routes + Integration Wiring in index.ts
description: Wire CLIAdapter and DelegateExecutor into the MaestroIDEServer class. Add three Hono API routes: GET /api/workflows (list available workflows via CLIAdapter), POST /api/workflows/execute (trigger workflow via DelegateExecutor), GET /api/project/state (read .workflow/state.json). Initialize CLIAdapter and DelegateExecutor in the server constructor and connect them to EventBus.
action: Modify src/lib/server/index.ts to import and instantiate CLIAdapterRegistry and DelegateExecutor. Add CLIAdapterRegistry and DelegateExecutor instantiation in constructor. Add async init() method that calls this.cliAdapter.detectVersion() and stores result. Update start() to call await this.init() before starting servers. Add 3 Hono routes: GET /api/workflows (calls cliAdapter.getAdapter().parseSkillsOutput()), POST /api/workflows/execute (calls delegateExecutor.execute(workflowId, params)), GET /api/project/state (reads <MAESTRO_PROJECT_DIR ?? process.cwd()>/.workflow/state.json via fs.readFileSync, returns 404 if not found). Update auto-start block to use async pattern.

criteria: MaestroIDEServer has readonly cliAdapter: CLIAdapterRegistry property
MaestroIDEServer has readonly delegateExecutor: DelegateExecutor property
POST /api/workflows/execute route exists and calls delegateExecutor.execute() with request body params
Constructor initializes CLIAdapterRegistry with DefaultCLIAdapter registered for major version 1
Constructor creates DelegateExecutor with eventBus injection
npx vitest run exits 0 (all existing + new tests pass)
GET /api/project/state reads process.env.MAESTRO_PROJECT_DIR ?? process.cwd() + /.workflow/state.json, returns 404 if file not found
start() method is async and calls await this.init() before starting servers
convergence.definition_of_done: Server exposes three API endpoints that connect CLI Adapter and Delegate Executor to HTTP clients, with proper initialization and error handling

files.change: Add CLIAdapterRegistry and DelegateExecutor imports and instantiation. Add three API routes. Add cliAdapter and delegateExecutor readonly properties. Add async init() method for version detection.
Import ProjectRadar into sidebar section, import WorkflowCommander into content area, replace placeholder content

implementation: Add imports at top of index.ts: import { CLIAdapterRegistry, DefaultCLIAdapter } from './cli-adapter.js'; import { DelegateExecutor } from './delegate-executor.js'; import { readFileSync, existsSync } from 'fs'; import { join } from 'path';
Add readonly properties to MaestroIDEServer: readonly cliAdapter: CLIAdapterRegistry; readonly delegateExecutor: DelegateExecutor;

In constructor, after existing initialization: this.cliAdapter = new CLIAdapterRegistry(); this.cliAdapter.registerAdapter(1, new DefaultCLIAdapter()); this.delegateExecutor = new DelegateExecutor(this.eventBus);

Add async init() method: const version = await this.cliAdapter.detectVersion(); const adapter = this.cliAdapter.getAdapter(version); console.log(`[Maestro IDE] Detected maestro v${version}`); Store currentAdapter for route use.

Add GET /api/workflows route in setupRoutes(): this.app.get('/api/workflows', async (c) => { try { const adapter = this.cliAdapter.getAdapter(this.currentVersion); const raw = await this.runCliCommand('maestro ralph skills --json --quiet'); const workflows = adapter.parseSkillsOutput(raw); return c.json({ workflows }); } catch (err) { return c.json({ error: (err as Error).message }, 500); } });

Add POST /api/workflows/execute route: this.app.post('/api/workflows/execute', async (c) => { const body = await c.req.json<{ workflowId: string; params: Record<string, unknown> }>(); const executionId = this.delegateExecutor.execute(body.workflowId, body.params); return c.json({ executionId, status: 'queued' }); });

Add GET /api/project/state route: this.app.get('/api/project/state', (c) => { const projectDir = process.env.MAESTRO_PROJECT_DIR ?? process.cwd(); const statePath = join(projectDir, '.workflow', 'state.json'); if (!existsSync(statePath)) { return c.json({ error: 'No project state found' }, 404); } const raw = readFileSync(statePath, 'utf-8'); return c.json(JSON.parse(raw)); });
Add private currentVersion: string = '' property. Update init() to set this.currentVersion = version after detection.
Add private runCliCommand(cmd: string): Promise<string> helper that uses child_process.execSync and returns stdout string.
Update start() method to call await this.init() before starting servers. Make start() async.

success_metrics: Three new API routes respond correctly

reference.pattern: Existing Hono route setup in index.ts setupRoutes() method. Constructor injection pattern from WSGateway/StateSyncEngine.

rationale.chosen_approach: Add routes to existing setupRoutes() method following the same pattern as /api/health and /api/translations. CLIAdapter and DelegateExecutor are initialized in constructor like other components. Version detection happens in async init() called from start().
decision_factors: Follow existing Hono route pattern in index.ts
CLIAdapter and DelegateExecutor are server-level singletons
Version detection is async (spawns process) so needs init() method
rationale.tradeoffs: start() becomes async, which changes the call site. This is acceptable since server startup is already async in practice (WebSocket server starts).

risks.risk: maestro CLI not available at runtime
risks.mitigation: init() catches UnsupportedVersionError and logs warning; /api/workflows returns 500 with clear error message
